ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step ID in the learning module */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., viewed, passed, discovered) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action in human-readable format */,
  "action_day" TEXT /* Day of the action */,
  "user_time" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user and the action time */,
  "user_learning_time_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold for user learning time */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to perform the action */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the LMS */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the learning module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the learning module */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the module belongs to */,
  "start_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first step in the module */,
  "end_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last step in the module */,
  "module_order" INTEGER /* Order of the module within the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_modules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_modules_start_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_modules_end_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the step belongs to */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the module */,
  "step_type" TEXT /* Type of the step (e.g., video, quiz, reading) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the step (e.g., text, video URL, quiz questions) */,
  "step_resource" TEXT /* Resource associated with the step (e.g., video file, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES learning_modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the user completed the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making progress */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the user is progressing through */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started the module */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user completed the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  "current_step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current step the user is on */,
  "progress_percent" REAL /* Percentage of the module completed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_current_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES learning_modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, push notifications) */,
  "font_size" INTEGER /* Preferred font size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score possible for the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., quiz, project, essay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was submitted */,
  "submission_data" TEXT /* Data included in the submission (e.g., code, answers) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received for the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded, returned) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES course_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
